# digitalcard

> Open-source digital business card builder. Compose blocks, pick a theme, and
> share by QR code or link. Self-host it (MIT) or use the hosted version.

## What it is

digitalcard is a free, open-source tool for creating a digital business card —
a single shareable page with your name, role, links, and contact actions. You
build the card from composable blocks (header, bio, links, social, contact, CTA,
gallery, map), choose a theme, then share it as a QR code, a link, or a saved
contact (vCard). The same rendering engine powers both the self-hosted build and
the hosted version; only the theme catalog differs.

## Key features

- Block-based editor: drag to reorder, toggle, and edit blocks live.
- Themes as data: pick from built-in themes or customize accent, font, radius,
  shape, alignment, and spacing.
- Sharing: QR code (PNG/SVG), copy link, and vCard (.vcf) export.
- Open-core: self-host the MIT-licensed build, or use the hosted version for a
  larger theme catalog.
- Privacy-friendly: your card data lives in your browser until you publish.

## Use cases

Personal profile, business card, link-in-bio, and save-to-contacts — all from
one composable card.

## Links

- Editor: https://digitalcard.app/edit
- Source code: https://github.com/digitalcard/digitalcard
